Channel Enable Register

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x120
Size:
0x4
Source:
stream_regs.rdl

Description

Per-channel enable bits (one bit per channel)

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:8] RSVD r 0x0 -
[7:0] CH_EN rw 0x0 -

Field Descriptions

RSVD

Reserved

CH_EN

Channel enable bits [7:0] - 1=enabled, 0=disabled
